Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Raban Heller. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Heller, R. (2026). songR: Self-Organizing Nebulous Growths for Dimensionality Reduction. R package version 0.1.0. https://github.com/r-heller/songR

@Manual{,
  title = {songR: Self-Organizing Nebulous Growths for Dimensionality Reduction},
  author = {Raban Heller},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/r-heller/songR},
}

Senanayake, D. A., Wang, W., Naik, S. H., & Halgamuge, S. (2021). Self-Organizing Nebulous Growths for Robust and Incremental Data Visualization. IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 32(10), 4588-4602. doi:10.1109/TNNLS.2020.3023941

@Article{,
  title = {Self-Organizing Nebulous Growths for Robust and Incremental Data Visualization},
  author = {Damith A. Senanayake and Wei Wang and Shalin H. Naik and Saman Halgamuge},
  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {32},
  number = {10},
  pages = {4588--4602},
  doi = {10.1109/TNNLS.2020.3023941},
}
